name: LoanMax Title Loans
description_short: Garden City, MI title loan store at 32667 Ford Rd — LoanMax Title Loans offers quick cash loans on vehicle titles with flexible terms.
description_long:
LoanMax Title Loans at 32667 Ford Rd in Garden City, MI is a standalone storefront specializing in title-secured loans. Open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM and Saturday from 9 AM to 2 PM, this location serves Garden City residents and the surrounding area with same-day loan options.

The Garden City branch offers title loans, secured personal loans, and short-term cash solutions. To discuss your loan options or get a quote, call the store directly at 734-203-0320. Staff can explain the documentation required and walk you through the application process.

If you're in Garden City looking for a quick loan secured by your vehicle title, bring a valid ID, proof of vehicle ownership, and proof of auto insurance. LoanMax provides transparent lending with no hidden fees.
pros: Loan amounts up to $10,000 available, higher than typical payday loans
Fast funding marketed as emergency cash access for immediate financial needs
Multiple payment methods accepted (cash, check, debit card, Western Union)
Five convenient Michigan locations within the Detroit metro area
Established company with 25+ years of operating history since 1990
Extended hours including Saturday morning appointments for working customers
No requirement for good credit—qualification based on vehicle equity value
cons: Title loans carry inherent repossession risk if payments are missed, putting vehicle at stake
Interest rates are not disclosed on the website, typical of the industry but potentially very high
Risk of debt trap: customers with inability to repay quickly may face vehicle loss
Company's own Nevada disclosure warns against using title loans as long-term solution
Limited transparency about loan terms, fees, and actual APR before application
best_for: Vehicle owners facing unexpected emergencies who need cash within days
Borrowers with poor credit unable to qualify for traditional personal loans
Those seeking larger emergency amounts ($5K–$10K) beyond payday loan limits
diagnosis: LoanMax is best for vehicle owners in financial emergencies who cannot qualify for traditional credit and need cash quickly. The critical caveat is that title loans are high-risk products with potential vehicle loss and typically very high interest rates; borrowers should only consider this after exhausting alternatives like credit unions, personal loans, or non-profit credit counseling.
services: Online payment portal for loan repayment
In-person loan origination at five Michigan locations
Payment acceptance via cash, check, debit card, and Western Union
Multi-state licensing and regulatory compliance documentation
Loan refinancing and account management services
meta_description: LoanMax Title Loans at 32667 Ford Rd, Garden City, MI. Quick title loans with flexible terms and same-day approval.
seo_title: LoanMax Title Loans in Garden City, MI | CreditDoc
